# The Weekly Digest

Welcome to this week's roundup of updates and announcements.

---

## Engineering Updates

The team shipped three major features this week, including the new dashboard redesign and improved search indexing.

***

## Product Announcements

Version 4.2 is now available for all users. The upgrade includes performance improvements and bug fixes reported during the beta period.

___

## Community Spotlight

Thanks to everyone who contributed to the open-source repository this month. We merged 47 pull requests from 12 different contributors.

- - -

## Upcoming Events

The annual developer conference is scheduled for September. Early bird registration opens next Monday.

----

## Job Openings

We're hiring across all engineering teams. Check the careers page for open positions in backend, frontend, and infrastructure roles.

## Setext Heading Ambiguity

This is a normal paragraph.

---

The line above is a horizontal rule. In some parsers, `---` immediately after a paragraph could be interpreted as a Setext-style heading underline. The editor should treat it as a rule when separated by a blank line.

## Closing Remarks

That wraps up this week's digest. See you next Friday.
